subcodes.first_line: O thou who thirstest for the Fount of Life! By God the Truth, the gardens of Paradise have drawn nigh, and the sacred precincts of the All-Merciful are adorned with beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الظمان الی معین الحیوان تالله الحق قد ازلفت الجنان و تانقت ایکه الرحمن و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for teaching, @living waters; water of life, @prayer for spiritual recognition
